prompt: Create a richly detailed anime-style Japanese festival bedtime illustration in a warm pastel palette. Show exactly two cute young women in ornate floral kimono standing close together in front of a decorative washi-paper and cherry-blossom backdrop: the left girl has soft pink short bob hair with long bangs covering one eye, pink-red visible eye, a cheerful open-mouth smile, blush, and elaborate sakura-and-ribbon hair ornaments with dangling tassels; the right girl has pale sky blue short bob hair, matching blue floral kimono, similar sakura hair ornaments and tassels, and her face is covered by a centered semi-opaque square censor block in muted gray-lavender fading to peach. Both girls hold one large horizontal rectangular paper sign in the foreground with aged cream paper, red-brown wooden trim, sakura decorations, a red ribbon bow at the bottom, and bold black Japanese calligraphy reading おやすみなさい バルス. Add one smaller hanging tag sign in the upper right with vertical black calligraphy reading お疲れ様. The scene contains exactly three visible paper lanterns on the upper left, all cream-colored with red cherry blossom patterns and dark caps, plus exactly two partially visible folding fans at the bottom corners, one red-and-navy on the left and one blue-and-gold on the right. Fill the background with Japanese patterned screens, gold wave motifs, pink cherry blossom branches, drifting sakura petals, tassels, soft ambient lantern light, intricate kimono fabric textures, and a dreamy high-detail GPT-image-2 anime illustration finish, vertical 4:3 composition, no modern objects except the censor square.
